title: combretum rupestre
intro: Combretum rupestre, also known as the rocky combretum, is a shrub or small tree species native to tropical Africa. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Combretum rupestre include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of these conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
